response.justification: Excellent software engineer with 15+ years of full-stack development experience, but the role is for a Principal Performance Architect specializing in AI accelerator hardware optimization. The candidate has no background in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, hardware design, or deep learning inference optimization on specialized hardware—the core competencies required. While technically strong in software, this represents a fundamental domain mismatch requiring extensive hardware architecture ramp-up.
strengths: 15+ years of technical experience satisfying Bachelor's + 8-year requirement
Demonstrated performance optimization expertise from low-latency systems at Dunnhumby and pricing optimization work
Some embedded systems exposure (robotic arms) and C/C++ experience showing willingness to work across the stack
concerns: Zero hardware architecture, SoC design, or IP modeling experience required for the role
No GPU architecture, AI accelerator, or SIMD/MIMD optimization background despite being core to the position
Entire 15-year career focused on software development with no evidence of transition toward systems-level hardware engineering
